product_visual_description: Occhiali da sole smart stile aviator oversize, modello A17 Nero. Montatura in acciaio inossidabile di colore nero lucido con ponte metallico superiore sottile. Lenti di grande formato, di forma ovale-aviator, in plastica con gradiente viola-grigio scuro (più scure in alto, quasi trasparenti in basso). Le aste sono nere, larghe e piatte, con piccoli inserti metallici argentati ai cardini. Il design è moderno, fashion, leggermente futuristico. Dimensioni percepite: occhiali maxi-oversize, coprono ampiamente il volto. Nessun logo visibile sulle aste o sulla montatura. Prodotto singolo, senza astuccio nella foto principale.
global_rule:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:
This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.
You are working with the uploaded reference photos of the GiDaCom Occhiali Smart Bluetooth A17 Nero.
THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTOS.
Do not redraw it. Do not reinterpret it. Do not simplify it.
Treat it as a photographic cutout — only backgrounds and surrounding graphic elements change.

THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE.
Do NOT alter its shape. Do NOT change its proportions.
Do NOT modify its colors. Do NOT add glow or effects ON it.
Do NOT blend it with the background.
If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.

IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
LOGO MODE FOR THIS JOB: LOGO_PROVIDED
- If LOGO_MODE == NO_LOGO: DO NOT ADD ANY LOGO, BRAND NAME, WATERMARK, OR PLACEHOLDER TEXT. DO NOT LEAVE EMPTY SPACE RESERVED FOR A LOGO — fill the full composition.
- If LOGO_MODE == LOGO_PROVIDED: follow the LOGO INTEGRATION RULES. The logo is the SECOND image_input (only for images 02, 04, 06, 09). For the other 6 images, behave exactly as NO_LOGO.
NEVER write the text "LOGO", "BRAND", "PLACEHOLDER", or similar AS TEXT in the image.

ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.
Font: modern bold sans-serif.

images.name: Hero Sfondo Bianco
images.prompt:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:
This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.
You are working with the uploaded reference photos of the GiDaCom Occhiali Smart Bluetooth A17 Nero.
THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTOS.
Do not redraw it. Do not reinterpret it. Do not simplify it.
Treat it as a photographic cutout — only backgrounds and surrounding graphic elements change.
THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE.
Do NOT alter its shape. Do NOT change its proportions.
Do NOT modify its colors. Do NOT add glow or effects ON it.
Do NOT blend it with the background.
If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.
IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
LOGO MODE: LOGO_PROVIDED — this image (01a) has NO logo. Fill every corner with content.
NEVER write the text "LOGO", "BRAND", "PLACEHOLDER" in the image.
ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.
Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 01A — HERO SFONDO BIANCO:

STEP 1 — EXTRACT THE PRODUCT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTO:
From the reference image, extract the glasses as a precise photographic cutout. The glasses are an oversize aviator-style frame in glossy black stainless steel with a thin metal bridge at the top. Lenses are large, oval-aviator shape, in dark gray-violet gradient plastic (darker at the top, nearly clear at the bottom). Arms are flat, wide, black with small silver metal hinges. Extract them cleanly — no person, no background bleeding.

STEP 2 — PLACE ON PURE WHITE BACKGROUND:
Canvas: 2000x2000px, background RGB(255,255,255) — pure white, no gradient, no shadow, no vignette.
Place the glasses cutout centered in the frame, occupying approximately 65-70% of the canvas width. Slight 3/4 front angle, as in the reference. The glasses must float naturally with a very subtle soft drop shadow directly beneath them (shadow color: rgba(0,0,0,0.08), blur radius 40px, offset 10px down) to indicate physical presence without making the background look off-white.

ZERO TEXT. ZERO LOGOS. ZERO ICONS. ZERO GRAPHICS. PURE WHITE PRODUCT SHOT.
This image is for Amazon's main product slot — absolute compliance with white background rules.

images.prompt:

Do NOT modify its colors. Do NOT add glow or effects ON it.
Do NOT blend it with the background.
If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.
IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
LOGO MODE: LOGO_PROVIDED — this image (01b) has NO logo. Fill every corner with content.
NEVER write the text "LOGO", "BRAND", "PLACEHOLDER" in the image.
ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.
Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 01B — HERO CON EFFETTO ENERGY BURST DORATO:

STEP 1 — RENDER THE PRODUCT EXACTLY AS IN THE REFERENCE PHOTOS:
Extract the glasses pixel-perfect from the reference photo. Oversize aviator frame, glossy black stainless steel construction, thin metal top bridge, large oval-aviator lenses with dark violet-gray gradient (dense at top, transparent at bottom), wide flat black arms with silver hinge detail. Place the glasses centered-slightly-upper in the 2000x2000 canvas, occupying 60-65% of canvas width. Slight 3/4 angle as in reference. THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE. Keep it on a fully separate layer. No effect may touch, overlap, or bleed onto the glasses.

STEP 2 — ADD BACKGROUND EFFECT ONLY BEHIND THE PRODUCT:
Canvas base: deep black #0A0A0A to very dark charcoal #111111 radial gradient, darkest at edges, slightly lighter at center.
ONLY in the area BEHIND and AROUND the product — NOT touching, NOT overlapping the glasses:
— Explosive radial golden light burst centered behind the glasses: warm gold #C8A050 at the core (opacity 80%), bleeding outward to deep amber #8B5E00 (opacity 40%), fading to black at all edges.
— From the core, 16-20 thin golden light rays (#C8A050 at 60% opacity) radiating outward like sunbeams — rays must stop and fade before reaching the glasses' outline.
— Scattered bokeh orbs: 30-40 small circular light spots ranging from 6px to 40px diameter, colors #C8A050, #FFD700, #E8B860, placed in mid-ground and background only, never ON the glasses.
— Subtle warm bronze lens-flare diagonal streak (#C8A050 at 25% opacity) in the lower-left background area only.
— Four corners: deep black, ensuring high contrast for the golden central explosion.
The effect creates an aspirational, premium, fashion-forward atmosphere.
NO text. NO logos. NO watermarks. NO empty space reserved for a logo.

images.name: Benefit Principale
images.prompt:

If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.

LOGO MODE: LOGO_PROVIDED — this image (02) INCLUDES the client logo (second image_input). See LOGO PLACEMENT at the end of this prompt.
NEVER write the text "LOGO", "BRAND", "PLACEHOLDER" in the image.
ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.
Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 02 — BENEFIT PRINCIPALE:

Background: deep navy-to-black gradient #0A0E27 (top-left) to #000000 (bottom-right). Overlay: very subtle hexagonal tech pattern at 4% opacity in #C8A050. This creates a premium tech-fashion feel.

LEFT 55% of canvas: product cutout from reference — the oversize aviator glasses extracted pixel-perfect, placed vertically centered, slightly angled (3/4 view). Glasses occupy the left column naturally without floating off-canvas. Soft ambient golden glow #C8A050 at 15% opacity placed ONLY in the background area immediately behind the glasses — not on the glasses.

RIGHT 45% of canvas: vertical stack of 5 benefit lines, centered in the right column, vertically centered overall.

TOP of right column: bold uppercase Italian headline:
"OCCHIALI CHE FANNO TUTTO"
— font: bold sans-serif, color white, size ~56px equivalent, tracked wide.
— Thin horizontal line separator (#C8A050, 1px, 80% width of right column) below the headline.

5 benefit lines (each line: checkmark icon + bold text in white):
✓ Traduttore AI in tempo reale
✓ Musica Bluetooth senza fili
✓ Rispondi alle chiamate mani libere
✓ Protezione UV certificata
✓ Design aviator ultramoderno

Checkmark: bold #C8A050 gold. Text: white bold sans-serif, ~40px. Thin #C8A050 separator line (20% opacity) between each benefit line.

BOTTOM of right column: small italic Italian subtext in #C8A050:
"Smart, stilosi, connessi."

Fill the entire canvas with content — no empty corner reserved for anything.

LOGO PLACEMENT: Integrate the brand logo (provided as the SECOND reference image) in the BOTTOM-RIGHT corner of the final image. Logo width: approximately 12-15% of the image width. Padding: about 4% from the right edge and 4% from the bottom edge. The logo must be clearly visible and legible. If the background behind the logo has a similar tone to the logo colors, add a subtle contrast enhancement (soft drop shadow OR a very faint white backdrop card at 10-20% opacity) to ensure readability. The logo is a brand marker: do NOT distort it, do NOT tilt it, do NOT let other elements cover it. Preserve the EXACT colors and proportions of the original logo. Do NOT add any text label next to the logo. This logo is the CLIENT brand identity (distinct from 'No supplier brand names or logos' in the negative prompt, which refers only to manufacturer marks visible on the product).

— color: white, bold sans-serif, ~52px

[Icona Audio] "AUDIO INTEGRATO"

Card text: title in #C8A050 bold ~34px, subtext white ~26px.

BOTTOM CENTER: bold white Italian phrase:
"Tecnologia avanzata in un occhiale."
— #C8A050 underline accent, centered.

Composition fills the full 2000x2000 canvas.

Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.
Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 07 — LIFESTYLE:

Show a fashionable Italian woman, 25-38 years old, confident and stylish, wearing the GiDaCom A17 Nero aviator smart glasses from the reference photo. The reference product cutout is placed pixel-perfect on her face in a realistic, photographic manner — glasses properly scaled to fit her face, correct perspective.

SETTING: Outdoor golden hour — a chic urban European street, warm late afternoon sunlight. Background: slightly bokeh'd (f/1.8 equivalent), warm tones — soft amber street lights beginning to glow, blurred architecture, terrace café in soft focus.

PERSON DETAILS:
— She is walking with purpose, slight 3/4 body turn toward camera.
— She wears a sleek black blazer or elegant dark top.
— Expression: confident, slightly mysterious half-smile, chin slightly down — the exact pose that shows off oversized aviator glasses best.
— One hand casually touching the glasses arm, as if adjusting them — natural, not posed.
— Hair: long, flowing, naturally moved by a light breeze.

LIGHTING: Warm golden bokeh in background. Rim light on her hair from behind (golden #C8A050 tone). Soft diffused fill light on her face. The glasses' gradient lenses catch the warm light subtly.

MOOD: Aspirational, authentic, magazine-quality. Not staged, not catalog. Real person, real moment.

NO TEXT OVERLAYS. NO GRAPHIC ELEMENTS. NO LOGO SPACE. NO ICONS.
Pure lifestyle photography feel — this is the emotional image of the set.

"Musica e chiamate in stile"
— Same card style.

BOTTOM-LEFT CARD:
[Icona sole] "ALL'APERTO"
"UV protection sempre attiva"
— Same card style.

BOTTOM-RIGHT CARD:
[Icona meeting/lavoro] "AL LAVORO"
"Mani libere, mente libera"
— Same card style.

Card layout inside each: icon (white, ~60px) top, then bold white Italian title ~32px, then italic gray subtext #888888 ~24px.
Four thin #C8A050 accent lines connect the four cards to the central product like spokes — very thin, 1px, at 40% opacity.

BOTTOM STRIP: dark #0A0A14 strip, centered white bold italic Italian:
"Smart in ogni momento della giornata."
Accent: #C8A050 color on "Smart".

images.name: Garanzia e Trust
images.prompt:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:
This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.
You are working with the uploaded reference photos of the GiDaCom Occhiali Smart Bluetooth A17 Nero.
THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTOS.
Do not redraw it. Do not reinterpret it. Do not simplify it.
Treat it as a photographic cutout — only backgrounds and surrounding graphic elements change.
THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE.
Do NOT alter its shape. Do NOT change its proportions.
Do NOT modify its colors. Do NOT add glow or effects ON it.
Do NOT blend it with the background.
If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.
IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
LOGO MODE: LOGO_PROVIDED — this image (09) INCLUDES the client logo (second image_input). See LOGO PLACEMENT at the end of this prompt.
NEVER write the text "LOGO", "BRAND", "PLACEHOLDER" in the image.
ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.
Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 09 — GARANZIA E TRUST:

Background: very deep dark burgundy-black #0D0509 to #1A0A0F radial gradient (center slightly lighter). Extremely faint diamond/rhombus pattern at 4% opacity in #C8A050 — tiny repeating diamond shapes. Thin #C8A050 border frame around the entire canvas (2px, 20px inset from edge).

TOP CENTER:
Bold white uppercase Italian trust headline:
"ACQUISTO PROTETTO"
— Below: thin #C8A050 separator line.
— Sub-label in #C8A050 italic: "Ogni ordine è garantito"

CENTER SECTION — 2×2 grid of 4 trust badge cards:

Top-left badge:
[Shield icon] "GARANZIA 12 MESI"
Subtext: "Assistenza diretta"

Top-right badge:
[Truck icon] "SPEDIZIONE RAPIDA"
Subtext: "Consegna veloce"

Bottom-left badge:
[Star/certificate icon] "QUALITÀ VERIFICATA"
Subtext: "UV Protection certificata"

Bottom-right badge:
[Headset icon] "SUPPORTO ITALIANO"
Subtext: "Siamo qui per te"

Each badge card: dark #100808 background, rounded corners 16px, border 1px solid #C8A050. Inside: icon (white, ~70px), bold white Italian badge title ~34px, italic gray subtext #999999 ~24px. Cards are equal size, filling the grid symmetrically. Small #C8A050 accent dot top-center of each card.

BOTTOM: product cutout of the glasses from reference, centered, approximately 40% canvas width. Below the glasses: a single line of white text bold:
"Stile smart con serenità."
Accent: #C8A050 on "serenità."

Full frame of content — no reserved empty area anywhere.

LOGO PLACEMENT: Integrate the brand logo (provided as the SECOND reference image) in the BOTTOM-RIGHT corner of the final image. Logo width: approximately 12-15% of the image width. Padding: about 4% from the right edge and 4% from the bottom edge. The logo must be clearly visible and legible. If the background behind the logo has a similar tone to the logo colors, add a subtle contrast enhancement (soft drop shadow OR a very faint white backdrop card at 10-20% opacity) to ensure readability. The logo is a brand marker: do NOT distort it, do NOT tilt it, do NOT let other elements cover it. Preserve the EXACT colors and proportions of the original logo. Do NOT add any text label next to the logo. This logo is the CLIENT brand identity (distinct from 'No supplier brand names or logos' in the negative prompt, which refers only to manufacturer marks visible on the product).

negative_prompt: No redrawn product. No illustrated or cartoon style product. No product recreated from scratch. No glow or color effect applied directly ON the product. No shape or proportion alteration of the product. No background effects touching, overlapping, or bleeding onto the product. No text in English (except brand names if inevitable). No supplier brand names or logos. No placeholder text like "LOGO HERE", "[BRAND]", "LOGO CLIENTE", "YOUR LOGO", "BRAND HERE". No empty rectangular or circular space intentionally left blank for a logo. No watermarks, no signatures, no trademark symbols. Do not write the word "LOGO" anywhere in the image. No cartoon glasses. No reinterpreted lens shape. No change to the gradient violet-gray lens color. No alteration of the black frame color. No illustration style arms or hinges. No generic sunglasses shape replacing the specific oversize aviator A17 design.
